judge_result.short_rationale: Includes fresh air, but omits two required immediate actions: call 911/ambulance if not breathing and call poison control or a doctor. It also adds wrong-incident skin washing/clothes removal, unsupported deep-breathing advice, and ingestion-related 'do not induce vomiting,' which are dangerous unsupported additions.
